query: SELECT mbc.id, mbc.company_id, mbc.obra_id, mbc.nome, mbc.cafe_manha_dia, mbc.lanche_tarde_dia, mbc.vale_alimentacao_mes, mbc.janta_dia, mbc.total_va_ifood, mbc.dias_uteis_ref, mbc.cafe_ativo, mbc.lanche_ativo, mbc.janta_ativo FROM meal_benefit_configs mbc ORDER BY mbc.company_id, mbc.obra_id
